---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=es&user=rYaloZcAAAAJ
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ortizbrizuela
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://ca.linkedin.com/in/ortiz-brizuela
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:edgar.ortiz-brizuela@mail.mcgill.ca"  
---

---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome 

## About Me
I am **Edgar Ortiz-Brizuela**, a Ph.D. student in Epidemiology at McGill University. 

## My Background
I graduated in Medicine at the Facultad de Medicina UASLP (University of San Luis Potosi Faculty of Medicine) in Mexico [website: [medicina.uaslp.mx](https://www.medicina.uaslp.mx/#gsc.tab=0)]. Subsequently, I specialized in Internal Medicine and Infectious Diseases at the Instituto Nacional de Ciencias Médicas y Nutrición Salvador Zubirán (INCMNSZ) in Mexico City [website: [www.incmnsz.mx](http://www.incmnsz.mx/)]. I also earned a Master of Science in Epidemiology from McGill University's Department of Epidemiology, Biostatistics, and Occupational Health [website: [www.mcgill.ca/epi-biostat-occh](https://www.mcgill.ca/epi-biostat-occh/)] and a Master of Sciences in Clinical Sciences from UNAM, Mexico [website: [www.medicina.unam.mx](http://www.facmed.unam.mx)].

## Research Interests
- Causal Inference
- Infectious Diseases
- Epidemiological Methods

## Connect With Me
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=es&user=rYaloZcAAAAJ)
- [Github](https://github.com/ortizbrizuela)
- [LinkedIn](https://ca.linkedin.com/in/ortiz-brizuela)
- [Email](mailto:edgar.ortiz-brizuela@mail.mcgill.ca)

Thank you for visiting. I warmly invite you to [explore my work](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=es&user=rYaloZcAAAAJ) or [reach out for collaborations](mailto:edgar.ortiz-brizuela@mail.mcgill.ca).

---
